description_wiki: Dessie (Amharic: ደሴ, romanized: Däse; also spelled Dese or Dessye) is a town in north-central Ethiopia.

description: country in the Horn of Africa
description_wiki: Ethiopia, officially the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, is a landlocked country located in the Horn of Africa region of East Africa.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: immigration lottery for entry into the United States
description_wiki: The Diversity Immigrant Visa program, also known as the green card lottery, is a United States government lottery program for receiving an immigrant visa followed by a permanent resident card.

description: city in and seat of Hennepin County, and largest city in State of Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Minneapolis is a city in Hennepin County, Minnesota, United States, and its county seat.
